scripts.check: biome check --write backend web mobile extension packages/shared .plans
scripts.check:ci: biome check backend web mobile extension packages/shared .plans
scripts.type-check: pnpm --filter @wishtracker/shared run build && pnpm --filter @wishtracker/shared run type-check && pnpm --filter wishtracker-backend run type-check && pnpm --filter wishtracker-web run type-check && pnpm --filter wishtracker-extension run type-check
scripts.validate: pnpm run check:ci && pnpm run type-check && pnpm run test
